name: 9Yards Golf Course Simulators & Lounge of Pittsburgh, PA
address: 6246 Northway Drive Space L2, Pittsburgh, PA 15237
about: 9Yards Golf Course Simulators & Lounge of Pittsburgh, PA offers a golf simulator experience combined with a lounge atmosphere. It features GolfZon TwoVision Simulators, which are noted for their high-quality technology and immersive gameplay. The venue provides a social environment for golfers of all skill levels, with options for individual play, group events, and corporate functions. Pricing includes an introductory 25% discount for first-time players.
why_golfers_like_it: Features world-renowned GolfZon TwoVision simulators rated #1 by Golf Digest
Combines advanced golf technology with a social lounge atmosphere
Offers event spaces with private TVs, sound systems, and activities for up to 60 guests

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food service with a dedicated coffee shop and full kitchen
Full bar service available with food and drinks

simulator_hardware.notes: Rated #1 by Golf Digest for five consecutive years; includes auto-tee, moving floor plates, and ball retrieval system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but a limited number of lefty clubs are available as part of the complimentary selection.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers an on-site kitchen and full bar, with options to purchase food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Before each round, you can set putting concede distance if you wish to get through holes faster.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is designed to be accessible for all skill levels and offers activities suitable for various age groups, making it family-friendly.
